full_text:
Bao Hong 鮑鴻/洪
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bao Hong (鮑鴻/洪)was born in Youfufeng. A colonel in the northern army who would later be reported embezzling local funds. Bao Hong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Bao Hong lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
